title: Benefit amount data layer
description: Benefit amount tables for in-kind programs PolicyEngine does not compute a dollar value for (e.g. Medicaid, WIC). Not needed for pure cash pass-through programs (SNAP/TANF) — see PATTERNS.md.

category_amounts.description: Maps a category key (e.g. ADULT, INFANT) to a monthly dollar amount. No fixed key enum here deliberately — different programs use different taxonomies (Medicaid's 11 keys, WIC's 6).

source.description: Required, not optional — see DECISIONS.md D-005. Distinguishes a real citation from an honest gap, rather than relying on free-text convention alone.
